message:
🐛 fix(test): wrap UpdateIndicator test in ToastProvider (#8283)

UpdateIndicator.tsx now calls useToast(), which throws
'useToast must be used within a ToastProvider' when the test
renders it bare. Wrap the render in ToastProvider so the
coverage suite passes again.

Fixes #8282

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
